# typescript-bits

A collection of TypeScript utility primitives for Node.js. Zero dependencies.

## Install

```sh
npm install typescript-bits
```

## Development

```sh
pnpm install
pnpm build       # Build with zshy
pnpm typecheck   # Type-check only
pnpm test        # Run tests
pnpm format      # Format with Prettier
```
